overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a suburban sidewalk next to a multi-lane road. The scene features overcast lighting, tall cypress trees lining the path, and various pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The camera moves steadily forward through a residential area with grassy medians and occasional traffic.

events.description: turning from intersection onto tree-lined sidewalk path
white sedan and black car navigate the intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: white sedan turning right at the intersection
black sedan following through the intersection

tall curved street light on the sidewalk edge
back of triangular traffic sign facing the camera
well-maintained grassy strip with trees dividing the road

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a suburban intersection with vehicles navigating the turn. The camera turns onto a sidewalk bordered by a grassy median with tall cypress trees visible ahead. The overcast sky provides diffused lighting over the residential area.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined pedestrian sidewalk with dense cypress canopy

events.description: passing behind the yield sign pole, temporarily blocking view
encountering first pedestrian walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the tree-lined sidewalk, approaching pedestrians

entered.detail: grey metal electrical utility box on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk flanked by tall cypress trees that partially obscure the sky. The camera passes a utility box and encounters the first pedestrian, a woman in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction. The dense tree line creates a corridor-like effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: continuing tree-lined sidewalk with adjacent parking area

events.description: passing second pedestrian wearing shorts and jacket
pedestrian talking on phone appears ahead on sidewalk

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles visible across the street behind the trees

segments.scene_description: The walk continues under the cypress tree canopy with parked cars now visible across the street. The camera passes a blonde woman looking at her phone and another pedestrian in the distance. The sidewalk remains bordered by grass and the dense tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with view of parking lot and low buildings

events.description: moving past dense tree cover into more open area with building views
passing male pedestrian in blue shirt and glasses

agents.ego_description: walking past the tree line with expanded view of adjacent parking lot and buildings

notable_agents.action: man in blue shirt and glasses walking past the camera

entered.detail: paved parking area with several parked vehicles and concrete dividers
single-story building with red tile roof and beige walls

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dense tree cover, the scene opens to reveal a parking lot and low commercial buildings on the left. The sidewalk continues alongside the road with a grassy strip. A pedestrian in a blue shirt passes by as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved roadside sidewalk with grassy hillside and traffic signage

events.description: approaching right-turn traffic sign indicating all traffic direction
slight left turn following the curve of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved sidewalk with hillside on the right, observing traffic

entered.detail: rectangular white sign with black text reading ALL TRAFFIC and right arrow
steep grass and rock hillside with scattered small trees and bushes
wooden utility poles with overhead electrical wires running parallel to road
tiered concrete seating steps along the grass edge beside sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk curves along the road with a prominent grassy hillside rising on the right. A traffic sign indicating 'ALL TRAFFIC' with a right arrow becomes visible. Power lines run parallel to the road, and concrete bench structures appear on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved suburban road with continuous pedestrian and vehicle traffic

events.description: passing woman in purple dress walking opposite direction
passing pedestrian in brown coat and hat

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved sidewalk, passing multiple pedestrians in succession

notable_agents.action: woman in purple dress with dark hair walking toward camera
woman in brown coat and hat walking on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows continued movement along the curved road with the grassy hillside still visible. Multiple pedestrians appear walking in the opposite direction, including a woman in a purple dress and another in a brown coat. Vehicles continue to pass on the adjacent road as the sidewalk stretches ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a suburban residential area that transitions from a sheltered corridor of trees into an open roadside landscape. It begins at a busy intersection under an overcast sky, turning onto a narrow sidewalk where a dense line of tall cypress trees creates a corridor-like effect. As the camera passes utility boxes and pedestrians walking in the opposite direction, the scene gradually opens up, emerging from the tree canopy to reveal a parking lot and low commercial buildings. The path then curves along the road, shifting from the wooded area toward a prominent grassy hillside and concrete benches under a network of power lines. Finally, the camera continues along the curving sidewalk, passing a traffic sign and several more pedestrians as vehicles flow along the adjacent multi-lane road.
